name: cramer-short
description: Cramer-Short - AI agent for deep financial research.

scripts.test:coverage: bun test src/gateway/gateway.test.ts src/controllers/agent-runner.test.ts src/controllers/agent-runner-runquery.test.ts src/utils/config.test.ts src/tools/finance/backtest/metrics.test.ts src/tools/search/x-search.test.ts src/tools/osint/geopolitics-search.test.ts src/tools/finance/portfolio-risk.test.ts src/tools/finance/wacc-inputs.test.ts src/tools/finance/fundamentals.test.ts src/tools/finance/yahoo-finance.test.ts src/agent/prompts.test.ts --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-dir coverage && bun run scripts/check-coverage.ts
scripts.test:integration: bun run test:live:guard && bun run scripts/run-isolated-bun-tests.ts integration
scripts.test:e2e: bun run test:live:guard && bun run scripts/run-isolated-bun-tests.ts e2e
scripts.test:full: bun run test:unit && bun run test:integration && bun run test:e2e
scripts.test:all: bun run test:unit && bun run test:integration && bun run test:e2e
